ticket_recommendations.title: Remediation review artifact does not contain runnable command evidence
ticket_recommendations.description: Remediate EXEC-REMED-001 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
ticket_recommendations.suggested_fix_approach: For remediation tickets with `finding_source`, require the review artifact to record the exact command run, include raw command output, and state the explicit PASS/FAIL result before the review counts as trustworthy closure.
ticket_recommendations.summary: For remediation tickets with `finding_source`, require the review artifact to record the exact command run, include raw command output, and state the explicit PASS/FAIL result before the review counts as trustworthy closure.

ticket_recommendations.title: The generated lifecycle contract is not verdict-aware, so FAIL review or QA artifacts can still look advanceable
ticket_recommendations.description: Remediate WFLOW023 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
ticket_recommendations.suggested_fix_approach: Extract verdicts from the latest review and QA artifacts, route FAIL or BLOCKED outcomes back to implementation, and reject lifecycle transitions when the latest artifact verdict is blocking or unclear.
ticket_recommendations.summary: Extract verdicts from the latest review and QA artifacts, route FAIL or BLOCKED outcomes back to implementation, and reject lifecycle transitions when the latest artifact verdict is blocking or unclear.

ticket_recommendations.title: Current artifacts contain explicit verdict headings or labels, but the generated verdict extractor still reports them as unclear
ticket_recommendations.description: Remediate WFLOW026 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
ticket_recommendations.suggested_fix_approach: Keep one shared artifact verdict extractor that accepts the real artifact family in use: plain and markdown-emphasized verdict labels, compact `QA/Review + verdict` headings, and `Overall: PASS/FAIL` labels. Route ticket_lookup and ticket_update through that shared parser instead of treating explicit review or QA verdicts as unclear.
ticket_recommendations.summary: Keep one shared artifact verdict extractor that accepts the real artifact family in use: plain and markdown-emphasized verdict labels, compact `QA/Review + verdict` headings, and `Overall: PASS/FAIL` labels. Route ticket_lookup and ticket_update through that shared parser instead of treating explicit review or QA verdicts as unclear.
